svg.title: Reconstructed spectrum and fitted observation operators
svg.text: Reconstructed HgCdTe spectrum and observation-operator fits
Moazzami 2005 Figure 6a; x=0.226, T=300 K, thickness=15.40 um
The gray/black coordinates are a reconstruction of the
published bitmap, not native instrument-export data.
Colored fits are displayed only over the declared fit
population. No local feature is assigned a mechanism.
